extra.reason: Implemented check_manifest(manifest, max_skew_seconds) returning (ok, reason) enforcing signature + issued_at/expires_at freshness with a skew window; verify_manifest now delegates to it (bool). Freshness enforced only when timestamps present. Unit test covers fresh/expired/not-yet-valid/no-timestamp. 13 tests pass, pyflakes clean.

Implemented minimal protocol-level admission helper: AdmissionPolicy, AdmissionDecision, admit_manifest, and domain_evidence_verifier. It checks manifest signature/freshness, required expiry, federation membership, protocol compatibility, signed_http requirement, endpoint scheme/private literal IP/domain allowlist, and optional host-supplied evidence verifier callback. Added tests for accepted domain proof, bad claims, required expiry, and domain mismatch. Verified: 17 unit tests pass, 4 integration tests pass with localhost socket approval, compileall passes, pyflakes clean.

Implemented replay protection with a Protocol seam. Added pimx.protocols.NonceStore and moved the concrete in-memory NonceCache to pimx.replay as a bounded, TTL-based, thread-safe implementation. verify_signed_request now accepts NonceStore, keeping top-level pimx.NonceCache for compatibility. Also added a protocols.EvidenceVerifier seam for admission evidence, following the qiao protocols/ style. Tests added for nonce expiry, replay rejection, max-size eviction, invalid limits, and admission protocol usage. Verified: 21 unit tests pass, 4 socket integration tests pass with localhost approval, compileall passes, pyflakes clean.
issued_at/expires_at now AwareDatetime; check_manifest uses direct comparisons; removed _check_window/_parse_iso; wire form pinned to UTC 'Z' via field_serializer
canonical_bytes now uses rfc8785.dumps (JCS); added rfc8785 dep
added find_jwk() helper (signing) reused in check_manifest + client; added FederationClient._send collapsing introduce/query/get_members/fetch_record

FederationClient now uses httpx.AsyncClient with async methods + async ctx manager; verify_signed_request is async; federated_query fans out concurrently via asyncio.gather; SSRF DNS moved off the event loop via run_in_executor. Integration harness/tests migrated to async (per-node event loop bridges the sync http.server threads).

Deleted src/pimx/replay.py (NonceCache) and protocols/replay.py (NonceStore Protocol). verify_signed_request takes an injected cashews Cache and claims the nonce via set(expire=max_skew, exist=False) AFTER signature verification. Tests use cashews mem:// backend. Added test_bad_signature_does_not_burn_the_nonce.

EvidenceVerifier.__call__ is async; admit_manifest is async and awaits the verifier; domain_evidence_verifier is async def. EvidenceVerifier Protocol kept (host trust material), unlike NonceStore which was deleted.

pimx core no longer depends on cashews: moved it to a [cashews] optional-extra + dev group. Added structural NonceCache Protocol (protocols/nonce.py) matching cashews' set(key,value,expire,exist) shape, so a cashews Cache is injectable with no adapter and core imports zero cache backend (proven: cashews not in sys.modules after import pimx, and pimx imports cleanly when cashews is unavailable). verify_signed_request types cache: NonceCache | None. README documents host-side wiring: pydantic-settings PIMX_ prefix -> Cache.setup(dsn) -> inject.
README refined for production usage, uv-first install flow, localized replay-cache guidance, and practical federation scenarios.
Scoped replay cache keys by federation/source/target/nonce, documented cache=None semantics, and added coverage for the exact cache set call.
